heading: Utilization of personnel by Architect of the Capitol for maintenance and operation of Botanic Garden
label: 2143 Utilization of personnel by Architect of the Capitol for maintenance and operation of Botanic Garden
text: On and after , with the approval of the Joint Committee on the Library, the Architect of the Capitol may utilize personnel paid from appropriations under his control for performance of administrative and clerical duties in connection with the maintenance and operation of the United States Botanic Garden, to such extent as he may deem feasible.December 27, 1974
notes: CodificationSection was classified to section 216b of former Title 40, prior to the enactment of Title 40, Public Buildings, Property, and Works, by , , .Pub. L. 107–217, § 1116 Stat. 1062Aug. 21, 2002
